lenses.guidance: vv 17-25's unblemished sacrifice requirement is what 1 Pet 1:19 names in Christ — 'a lamb without blemish or defect.' The disqualifying defects of vv 22-24 anticipate Jesus, by contrast, as the flawless offering.

vv 31-33's 'I am the LORD, who made you holy and brought you out of Egypt to be your God' echoes the exodus-holiness formula across Scripture — Lev 11:45, Lev 19:36, Lev 25:38, and Lev 26:13 all carry the same canonical refrain.
